title: cavallium urens
intro: Cavallium urens, also known as the prickly cadamba, is a type of tree native to tropical Asia. The bark and leaves of the Cavallium urens plant are traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cavallium urens include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Cavallium urens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
